name: Bell Park
description: Bell Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenwood, AR. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Ben Geren Park
description: Come play pickleball at Ben Geren Park in Fort Smith, AR! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Chaffee Crossing Pickleball Complex
description: Chaffee Crossing Pickleball Complex is a place to play pickleball in Fort Smith, AR. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Greenwood Nazarene Church
description: Greenwood Nazarene Church is a place to play pickleball in Greenwood, AR. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Sign up required through GAPP (Greenwood AR Pickleball Players)

name: River Valley Fitness
description: Come play pickleball at River Valley Fitness in Fort Smith, AR! There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available.
fees: Members only — One day fee $10 for all day pass.

name: Ron Pawley Jr. Sports Complex
description: Ron Pawley Jr. Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lavaca, AR. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: The Hangout Fitness and Sports
description: The Hangout Fitness and Sports is a place to play pickleball in Fort Smith, AR. There are 12 courts. 2 are outdoors and 10 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.
fees:
Members only — $12/1.5 hr court fee for indoor
No fee for outdoor court
